scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.setup: cd server && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed
scripts.start: cd server && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx src/server.ts
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
